title: Skeletal Plus
description: Adds New Skeleton And Slime Types For Different Biomes. (Suggested By DrgnT8mr)
body:
# Skeletal Plus
**Based on DrgnT8mr's Suggestion!**

Check out the video [Here](https://youtu.be/RfeMxnGDIOo?si=ZKg0KucSjsrrO4e2).

This video was inspired by Knarfy's "Breaking Minecraft With Your Dumb Ideas" series.

## Features

- Desert Skeleton
- End Slime **{Bug #680}**
- End Slimeball


## Known Bugs
- **{Bug #680}** THe End Slime Has The AI Of A Slime, Therefore It Has The Sizing And Splitting AI. It's Model Does Not Change To Reflect The Scale Changes, Though The Hitbox does.


please note that this mod is from the same video as GB's dumb additions.

Enjoy!
